title: Project Aegis Scenario Document
description: Canonical scenario document format as serialized by ScenarioDocumentJsonWriter (ADR-008 authoring model). Property names are camelCase. The writer uses JsonSerializerOptions with CamelCase naming and no DefaultIgnoreCondition, so every DTO property is always emitted: nullable fields serialize as null and empty collections serialize as []. This schema reflects that always-emitted shape. NOTE: these documents are NOT the same as data/scenarios/*.policy.json (sim policy files); they are authoring documents mapping to ScenarioDocumentDto.

missions.description: Mission list. Serialized from ScenarioDocumentDto.Missions (always present, may be empty []).

events.description: Optional typed event DSL entries (AME-5.x). Null when unset.

editorState.description: Derived-only editor UI state; never read by ScenarioValidationEngine.

metadata.description: Maps to ScenarioMetadataDto. All properties are always serialized by the writer; nullable ones may be null.

title.description: Human-readable scenario title. Nullable when unset.

description.description: Human-readable scenario description. Nullable when unset.

author.description: Scenario author or source label. Nullable when unset.

schemaVersion.description: Scenario authoring schema version. DTO default is 1.

dbRef.description: Catalog / database reference bound at scenario load (e.g. 'baltic_patrol'). Nullable.

dbSnapshotId.description: Optional immutable snapshot id of the bound database. Nullable.

editVersion.description: Optimistic-concurrency edit version (req 11). CreateNew() seeds this at 1; each CommitMutation() increments it.

seed.description: Scenario RNG root (GDD metadata.seed). Serialized from a ulong; DTO default is 42.

policyId.description: Id of a data/scenarios/*.policy.json sim policy used for harness sample runs. Nullable.

tlBranch.description: Technology-level branch binding at load (TL-0 through TL-5), e.g. 'TL-2'. Validated at load, not mid-tick. Nullable.

unitReadiness.description: Per-unit launch readiness map keyed by unit id (req 16). Nullable when unset.

maxTechnologyLevel.description: Scenario max technology level for near-future gates (req 09). DTO default is 2.

nearFutureUnits.description: Near-future archetype spawn rows to instantiate at harness start (req 09). Nullable when unset.

sideRoe.description: Side-level ROE default (AME-3.2). Null means WeaponsFree.

readyForLaunch.description: Whether the unit is ready for launch. DTO default is true.

nearFutureUnit.description: Maps to ScenarioNearFutureUnitDto (req 09 CCA / attritable runtime).

unitId.description: Runtime unit id assigned to the spawned unit.

waypoint.description: Maps to ScenarioWaypointDto. A geographic vertex of a patrol zone.

mission.description: Maps to ScenarioMissionDto. The writer always emits all properties (id/type/assigned/target/ferry/patrol/roe/support) for every mission regardless of type: unused collections serialize as [] and nullable fields as null. The 'type' discriminator selects which fields carry meaningful content, enforced by the allOf branches below.

id.description: Unique mission id within the document.

type.description: Mission type discriminator (PascalCase values, as written by ScenarioDocumentEditor).

assignedUnitIds.description: String ids of units assigned to the mission (always present, may be empty).

targetIds.description: String ids of targets. Meaningful for Strike; empty [] for Patrol/Ferry.

ferryDestinationBaseId.description: Destination base id. Meaningful (non-null) for Ferry; null for Patrol/Strike.

patrolZone.description: Patrol zone vertices. Meaningful for Patrol; empty [] for Strike/Ferry.

roeOverride.description: Mission-level ROE override (AME-3.2). Null inherits sideRoe or WeaponsFree.

supportRole.description: Support mission role. Meaningful for Support; null for other mission types.

patrolZone.description: A valid patrol zone is a closed area and requires at least 3 vertices.

unitId.description: Unit id for zone-entry and unit-state conditions.

result.description: Optional explicit evaluation hint for debugger fixtures.

unitId.description: Target unit id for unit-scoped actions.

lat.description: Latitude for TeleportUnit and placement actions.

lon.description: Longitude for TeleportUnit and placement actions.

id.description: Unique event id within the document.

conditions.description: All conditions that must hold for the event to fire.

actions.description: Actions executed when the event fires.
